bias_detected.location: 0408 era 97% PASS rate used as baseline
bias_detected.key_stat: 0408 era = 1 strategy family (30 improvements from 0408-013), NOT 33 independent samples
current_streak=3 < historical_max=5. Past 5-streaks recovered without env fix (3 times).

alternative_hypotheses.rationale: No direct evidence. O(params) scaling explains Gen023 duration normally.

alternative_hypotheses.hypothesis: Strategy generation quality degradation (fx-strategist prompt drift)
alternative_hypotheses.rationale: 0416+ era first-gen PASS=30.0% vs pre-0416=42.9%, mean_sharpe=-0.237 vs +0.484.

alternative_hypotheses.hypothesis: L1 threshold (0.3) vs fx-strategist prompt mismatch
alternative_hypotheses.rationale: 4 strategies have positive Sharpe < 0.3: 0417-014(0.245), -015(0.275), 0417-018(0.182), 0418-001(0.182). Recoverable via explicit Sharpe target in prompt.

alternative_hypotheses.hypothesis: Cluster cap forcing diversity into unknown territory
alternative_hypotheses.rationale: CLUSTER_CAP=3 for USD_JPY may have pushed generation into less-understood pairs.

priority_order: 1. fix_strategy_gen: improve fx-strategist prompt with explicit L1 Sharpe target, verify EUR_JPY/GBP_USD spread settings
2. review_l1_threshold: evaluate 4 near-miss strategies (positive but sub-0.3 Sharpe)
3. investigate_env: confirm why ATLAS-2026-0418-004 has NO RESULT (hang vs not-run)

historical_pass_rate_analysis.note: 0408 era bias: 32 of 33 PASS belong to 1 strategy family - not independent samples
historical_pass_rate_analysis.correction: 20+ consecutive FAILs NOT found in data. Max = 5 consecutive (occurred 3 times). 0416+ era has 19 FAILs total but 6 PASSes interrupt.

param_sensitivity_duration_analysis.verdict: 15 minutes is 88% of expected 17.1 minutes. Classified as normal operation, not a hang.

gen023_statistical_validity.verdict: Sharpe=0.447 is significantly > 0 (t=3.46) but NOT significantly > L1 threshold of 0.3 (Z=1.14 < 1.96). Statistical artifact risk cannot be excluded.
